name: PCCOOLER CPS YS1000 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 1000W PSU, 12V-2x6 Cable, ATX 3.1 & PCIe 5.1 Ready, 105°C Rated Japanese Capacitors, ECO Mode, 135mm FDB Fan, 12 Years Warranty and PCCOOLER CPS DS360Pro Digital AlO CPU Liquid Cooler, 360mm Radiator, 310W TDP, ARGB LEDs & Digital Display, Aluminum Pump Cover, for Intel LGA20XX/1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, Black
